ClippyCore
Table of Contents

Interface IAgent

Namespace
ClippyCore.Interfaces
Assembly
ClippyCore.dll

Interace contract for all Agents and derived classes. Agent implements IAgent, and other derivites inherit from Agent Base implementation is Agent.cs

public interface IAgent
